title: WisdomTree Inflation Plus Fund ETF declares $0.085 dividend
content:
* WisdomTree Inflation Plus Fund ETF (WTIP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WTIP]) declared $0.085/share monthly dividend.
 	* Payable Nov. 26; for shareholders of record Nov. 24; ex-div Nov. 24.
